text:

Super Evangelion Kesara and Basara 2.jpg|Super Evangelion preparing the sword, illustration by Ikuto Yamashita.
EbrvV9sU4AI-6HX.jpg|(counter-clockwise) S.EVA with Q.R. Signum embedded in it's chest instead of a Core (note the extrusion from its chest), S.EVA prepares to fight Evangelion Unit-0.0, Rei Quatre pilots S.EVA in conjunction with Shinji, a Brainwashed Ryoji Kaji stands with a captured Rei Quatre, illustration by Ikuto Yamashita.
Super Evangelion versus US Evangelion Wolfpack.jpg|Super Evangelion brief fight against US Evangelion/Wolfpack, illustration by Ikuto Yamashita.
Super Evangelion holding Azumaterasu.png|Super Evangelion holding Azumaterasu, illustration by Ikuto Yamashita.
Super Evangelion Azumaterasu Full Color.png|Super Evangelion holding Azumaterasu, full color illustration by Ikuto Yamashita.
